Cortechs.ai's flagship product, NeuroQuant®, is a breakthrough, 510(k) cleared medical device that makes quantitative analysis of MRI images of the human brain a routine part of clinical practice. As the first FDA cleared and CE marked medical device capable of automatically detecting and quantifying atrophy in the human brain, NeuroQuant® brings sophisticated, accurate, and fully automated MRI post-processing capabilities. This provides neurologists, radiologists, and clinical researchers with a convenient and cost-effective means to quantify atrophy of brain structures to help diagnose a variety of brain disorders, including conditions such as Alzheimer's disease, multiple sclerosis, epilepsy and traumatic brain injury.

Rebellion Industries is designing a new category for the modern security and defense era—spanning national defense, critical infrastructure, and commercial environments where sensing, autonomy, and decision speed are mission-critical. Threat has changed. Conflict and disruption are no longer episodic, geographically bounded, or slow-moving; they’re continuous, asymmetric, and defined by software, autonomy, and sensing at scale across airspace, borders, energy systems, supply chains, and data centers. Yet most systems remain disconnected: hardware sold in isolation, software added as visualization, and decisions left to manual coordination under pressure. Rebellion Industries is creating the category of unified sensing and decision infrastructure, otherwise as known as the Sensor OS. This category treats security as a continuously operating system, not a collection of tools. It fuses sensors, software, and autonomy into one intelligence layer that shares sensing (not siloed), turns data into decisions (not dashboards), and enables fast, adaptive response across military, government, and commercial domains. This category exists because speed, integration, and adaptability now matter more than static capability. Rebellion Industries is building the operating layer for modern security systems- the backbone for how these systems will be designed, deployed, and trusted.

We are a company founded by Christof Stork and Sissy Theisen with the goal of providing more reliable seismic data to our customers. We have several proprietary algorithms that help us do this, including machine learning technology called "GEARS" for use in noise removal on prestack land seismic data. We are a full service seismic processing company as well as providing consulting services for new seismic acquisition. By using advanced algorithms for noise identification and removal we plan to change noise removal on land seismic data from an art to a science. The benefits of this deterministic methodology include much improved high and low frequencies and near and far offsets in the seismic data leading to improved reliability of attributes, shortening of the processing cycle time, and more interpretable seismic volumes. Additionally, by characterizing the noise that is likely to be present on new acquisition, we can change the design - at little or no additional cost - to eliminate noise and also to make the noise more removable through the machine learning methods.

role: Chief Discovery Officer and Head of Chemistry
description: Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.

Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.

DDC-I provides DO-178C certifiable software and tools for safety critical avionics. Developed from day one using DAL A plans and procedures, Deos features hard real-time response, superior multicore technology, industry standard ARINC653 and FACE Safety Base APIs, and shared resource partitioning to deliver the highest CPU utilization and performance possible in the industry. Additionally, Deos’ innovative SafeMC technology for multicore processors is unmatched, delivering maximum safety-critical performance across multiple cores. Some key advantages of Deos are: • DO-178 Certification Artifact Reuse Through Software Modularity (leveraging certification credit from prior certifications) • Industry Leading SafeMC™ Technology for Safety Critical Systems on Multicore Processors • Time & Space Partitioning (allows mixed levels of criticality running on the same device) • Extensive Certification Pedigree (Certified to DAL A Since 1998) • Patented Slack Scheduling Technology (allows for full processor utilization) • Scalable from Simple LRUs to Complex IMA Systems • ARINC-653, Priority Preemptive, and/or Rate Monotonic Scheduling Available • Industry Standard Application Programming Interfaces (API’s) ARINC-653 & POSIX

Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.

Datch is a platform that leverages AI to capture highly detailed, structured human-centric data while surfacing asset insights for decision-making and resource management. Our goal is to cut deep into the availability shortfall by providing the data and intelligence needed to decrease asset MTTR, increase MTBF, support better planning and allow for faster decision making. In order to support the asset availability goals across resource management, reporting, planning, scheduling, and reliability, the product is designed around a single value proposition: ”perfect data”. By perfect data, we mean complete, highly accurate, context rich reports coming in from the frontline, and perfect recall and distillation of data to the right people at the right time. Data capture is achieved through a combination of worker enablement capabilities, such as speech-to-text, real-time translation, and conversational AI, and data enrichment, through features that add context and guidance to transform the data as it’s captured. Data accessibility and asset insights are tools that are underpinned by generative search trained on the company’s document management system, work management history, and other language-rich data sources related to assets.

We are the team behind the synthetic data vault. DataCebo is an AI company dedicated to solving the world's data availability problems using AI generated synthetic data. SDV was originally created at MIT in 2018 and we have stayed true to our mission. PICMG is a not-for-profit 501(c) consortium of companies and organizations that collaboratively develop open standards for high performance industrial, military/aerospace, telecommunications, test/measurement, medical, and general purpose embedded computing applications. There are over 150 member companies that specialize in a wide range of technical disciplines, including mechanical and thermal design, single board computer design, very high speed signaling design and analysis, networking expertise, backplane and packaging design, power management, High Availability software, and comprehensive system management. Founded in 1994, PICMG’s original mission was to extend the PCI standard to non-desktop applications. The formal name of the organization is the PCI Industrial Computer Manufacturers Group. Key specifications standards developed under the PICMG consortium include: - COM Express® - COM-HPC® - MicroTCA®, AdvancedMC®, and AdvancedTCA® - ModBlox7 - CompactPCI® and CompactPCI®Serial - InterEdge - SHB Express - HPM (Hardware Platform Management) You can find short form documents of the specifications on our website, as well as links to download the full documents.

It’s a win for the plants, and for the future of clean energy.” Jerrold Vincent, our CFO and co-founder, adds: “Back in 2016, we recognized the potential for AI to support nuclear—not just in cutting costs, but in preparing the next generation of workers. Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.

We are a company founded by Christof Stork and Sissy Theisen with the goal of providing more reliable seismic data to our customers. We have several proprietary algorithms that help us do this, including machine learning technology called "GEARS" for use in noise removal on prestack land seismic data. We are a full service seismic processing company as well as providing consulting services for new seismic acquisition. By using advanced algorithms for noise identification and removal we plan to change noise removal on land seismic data from an art to a science. The benefits of this deterministic methodology include much improved high and low frequencies and near and far offsets in the seismic data leading to improved reliability of attributes, shortening of the processing cycle time, and more interpretable seismic volumes. Additionally, by characterizing the noise that is likely to be present on new acquisition, we can change the design - at little or no additional cost - to eliminate noise and also to make the noise more removable through the machine learning methods.

Raisonance is headquartered in the Denver Tech Center in Colorado, dedicated to Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning-based healthcare solutions, focused on using artificial intelligence to detect patterns in the sound of human coughs. RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Connect with the RAIsonance Group of companies at www.raisonance.ai and at FCVWellness.com or on Twitter @RAIsonanceGroup.

THEFENCE™is a modularly built identity governance and administration (IGA) platform tailored for organizations of all sizes. Our software is offering innovative cybersecurity solutions such as: - TheFence ARM (Access Risk Management: SoD & Least Privilege Access Control) - TheFence UAR Plus (AI-powered periodic User Access Review automation) - TheFence DAPP (AI-supported, identity level Dynamic Access Profile Packaging) - TheFence IDM Lite (Identity lifecycle automation, Access Request Management) THEFENCE™, “the vulnerability scanner of access rights”, provides a scheduled and automated discovery of users and their roles, their validity, and entitlement data in different systems and applications. It then automatically performs a measurable, scoring-based risk analysis, which is captured in actionable reports and sent to designated managers or departments. Finance, HR, IT security, internal audit, or IT operations respectively can then revoke excessive, unnecessary, or conflicting (SoD) access rights or delete inactive users from systems. The THEFENCE™ risk policy framework includes a scoring-based high privilege and segregation-of-duties (SoD) rule set that can easily be extended to meet the specific needs and requirements of any organization. The monitored systems can range from business applications to different IT infrastructure layers or cloud platforms, network technologies, operating systems, middleware, or database layers. Moreover, any other custom application or individual technology can easily be developed and connected. THEFENCE™ is also capable of detecting cross-application conflicts of interest, i.e. conflicting access rights between multiple systems (cross-system SoD).

We are a company founded by Christof Stork and Sissy Theisen with the goal of providing more reliable seismic data to our customers. We have several proprietary algorithms that help us do this, including machine learning technology called "GEARS" for use in noise removal on prestack land seismic data. We are a full service seismic processing company as well as providing consulting services for new seismic acquisition. By using advanced algorithms for noise identification and removal we plan to change noise removal on land seismic data from an art to a science. The benefits of this deterministic methodology include much improved high and low frequencies and near and far offsets in the seismic data leading to improved reliability of attributes, shortening of the processing cycle time, and more interpretable seismic volumes. Additionally, by characterizing the noise that is likely to be present on new acquisition, we can change the design - at little or no additional cost - to eliminate noise and also to make the noise more removable through the machine learning methods.

Coginiti is the Semantic Intelligence Platform that helps data teams build, govern, and operationalize trusted business logic across every data platform — so AI agents and humans make decisions from the same source of truth. Most organizations struggle to move AI from pilot to production. The bottleneck isn't model quality — it's data quality, fragmented definitions, and ungoverned business logic scattered across tools, teams, and platforms. Coginiti solves this by unifying the full lifecycle of business meaning: from development and testing through semantic definition, governance, and enterprise-wide consumption. The platform includes two purpose-built AI agents: Coginiti Smith helps data teams define and govern the universal semantic graph — standardizing metrics, authoring transformations, and encoding business context. Coginiti Guide enables business users and AI applications to query governed data in natural language, operating within the semantic contract Smith defines. Core capabilities: 21+ native data platform connections, CoginitiScript for modular analytics, a shared catalog with version control and code review, data lineage, agent observability, enterprise API access (JDBC/ODBC, REST), and native orchestration. What makes Coginiti different: Unlike tools that start at metric definitions and work outward, Coginiti was built from data operations upward. The semantic layer is the capstone of a comprehensive DataOps workflow — not a standalone product. Every metric traces back to the development, testing, and review that produced it. Coginiti connects to 21+ platforms including Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Oracle, SQL Server, and legacy systems. It deploys in cloud, hybrid, on-prem, and air-gapped environments with IL2-IL6 security and Zero Trust architecture. 300+ organizations across government, defense, healthcare, financial services, and retail trust Coginiti to operationalize the meaning of their data.

We are a company founded by Christof Stork and Sissy Theisen with the goal of providing more reliable seismic data to our customers. We have several proprietary algorithms that help us do this, including machine learning technology called "GEARS" for use in noise removal on prestack land seismic data. We are a full service seismic processing company as well as providing consulting services for new seismic acquisition. By using advanced algorithms for noise identification and removal we plan to change noise removal on land seismic data from an art to a science. The benefits of this deterministic methodology include much improved high and low frequencies and near and far offsets in the seismic data leading to improved reliability of attributes, shortening of the processing cycle time, and more interpretable seismic volumes. Additionally, by characterizing the noise that is likely to be present on new acquisition, we can change the design - at little or no additional cost - to eliminate noise and also to make the noise more removable through the machine learning methods.

description: Raisonance is headquartered in the Denver Tech Center in Colorado, dedicated to Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning-based healthcare solutions, focused on using artificial intelligence to detect patterns in the sound of human coughs. RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.
